caption: A man wearing a light-colored shirt and a grey-and-white patterned shawl speaks into an ANI-branded microphone in an outdoor setting with trees and white tents in the background. He is flanked by other people, including a man in a white shirt and a person in a dark suit. On-screen graphics overlay the footage, featuring portraits of several politicians. Text in Hindi appears at the top and bottom of the screen. The top banner changes from "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा" to "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and then to "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है". The bottom ticker reads "जे. पी. नड्डा: डबल इंजन की सरकार लंबी छलांग लगाएगी". Portraits on the sides change between figures such as "डिप्टी CM", "सब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "बिजेन्द्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार", with "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" and "संतोष सुमन" appearing in later frames. The time "10:06 PM" is visible in the bottom right.
